description_long: This is a small, plush stuffed toy designed to resemble a zebra. Its body is primarily white with light brown stripes running horizontally along its sides and legs, mimicking the natural pattern of a zebra. The mane and tail are made from a darker, shaggy gray material, giving it a textured and playful appearance. The legs and snout are capped with the same dark gray fabric, suggesting hooves and a muzzle. The toy has a rounded, soft form with visible seams and a slightly worn look, indicating it may be well-loved or used. The facial features are simple, with small, dark eyes and a subtle snout, giving it a gentle and approachable expression.
description: A small, plush zebra stuffed toy with white and light brown stripes, dark gray mane, tail, and hooves, and a soft, rounded body.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the zebra's face, mane, and striped body with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, mane, and tail, with both back legs and the tail's full length visible.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the full length of the body, tail, and the striped pattern along the side.
description_view_3: Rear-right view focusing on the back of the head, mane, and the right side of the body and legs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small, dark eyes and a simple snout. There are no pronounced eyebrows or mouth, giving it a calm and approachable look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing on all four legs with the head slightly raised and the tail extended behind. The body is upright and balanced, resembling a natural zebra stance.
